description_long: This object is a compact urban gas station setup featuring a single, modern fuel pump situated on a small, tiled platform. The pump is housed under a large, rectangular concrete canopy supported by a single, robust column. The fueling area includes a trash bin and a small bollard, with the ground surface showing a mix of concrete and tiled textures. The fuel pump is metallic, with visible hoses and a digital interface, and is positioned centrally beneath the canopy. There are several signs attached to the supporting column, including safety notices and a small rectangular sign, but no prominent branding or price display is visible. The overall design is utilitarian, with a focus on functionality and minimal ornamentation.
description: A small, modern gas station with a single fuel pump under a large concrete canopy, featuring minimal signage and a utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central fuel pump, canopy support column, and tiled fueling area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the canopy, the fuel pump, trash bin, and attached signage.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the fuel pump and the canopy's support structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the canopy, pump, and additional signage on the column.
attribute_fuel_pumps: One modern, metallic fuel pump is present, centrally located under the canopy. It features a digital display, visible hoses, and a nozzle, with a simple, functional design and no visible branding.
attribute_canopy_structure: A large, flat, rectangular concrete canopy is supported by a single, thick column. The canopy is gray and unadorned, with no visible lighting or signage attached.
attribute_station_signage: Several small signs are attached to the canopy support column, including a safety notice and a rectangular sign, all in neutral colors. No large brand or directional signage is visible.
